recommendations.title: K-9: P.I.
recommendations.overview: Dooley and his K-9 partner Jerry Lee are ready to retire from the police force. But before he can retire with his pension he must work as a P.I. to find a set of high tech computer chips.

recommendations.title: Farinelli
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

recommendations.title: Walk the Line
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of country music legend Johnny Cash's life, from his early days on an Arkansas cotton farm to his rise to fame with Sun Records in Memphis, where he recorded alongside Elvis Presley, Jerry Lee Lewis and Carl Perkins.

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.

recommendations.title: Miles Ahead
recommendations.overview: An exploration of the life and music of Miles Davis.

recommendations.title: Two Sons of Francisco
recommendations.overview: The story of Francisco, a very simple and poor man whose dream was to see his children become country music stars, and who made all the efforts to make it happen.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Get On Up
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of James Brown's rise from extreme poverty to become one of the most influential musicians in history.

recommendations.title: Django
recommendations.overview: The story of Django Reinhardt, famous guitarist and composer, and his flight from German-occupied Paris in 1943.

recommendations.title: Barney's Version
recommendations.overview: The picaresque and touching story of the politically incorrect, fully lived life of the impulsive, irascible and fearlessly blunt Barney Panofsky.
